2025-26 Dallas Mavericks Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 26-56, Finished 12th in NBA Western Conference

Coach: Jason Kidd (26-56)

Executive: Nico Harrison, Michael Finley, Matt Riccardi

PTS/G: 114.1 (23rd of 30) Opp PTS/G: 119.6 (23rd of 30)

SRS: -5.33 (23rd of 30) Pace: 101.7 (4th of 30)

Off Rtg: 111.2 (27th of 30) Def Rtg: 116.5 (20th of 30) Net Rtg: -5.4 (23rd of 30)

Expected W-L: 28-54 (23rd of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +3500, Over-Under 41.5

Arena: American Airlines Center Attendance: 790,821 (7th of 30)
